sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Keima Topa Jesuh lamdang Honpa hi
Kei aa ding lamdang Honpa hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A itna sungah ka nun’takna phumta
ma khut in kei hong tuamta
A ma khut in kei hong tuamta

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Amah’n hong len a kei ka liing kei ding
Ka ni bang in tha hong pia hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kisim zolo thupha hong pia kimat in
Lungdamin la ka sa Pasian minthang hen
Hih bang Tanpa ka nei hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ama dikna puan paak silh a ka thawh ciang
Ama hong itna leh hong hotna kicing
Van ah aw tampi tawh sa ning
